en: You hungry? You want a bite?
But I told them I wouldn't bring them to you unless I could put the cuffs on you myself.
ko: 하지만 내가 너에게 수갑을 채울 수 없다면 데려가지 않겠다고 말했어.

en: Oh, you have a gun?
You have a gun? No gun? No. No gun.
ko: 총이 있어? 총 없어? 없어. 총 없어.

en: And you tell me what there's a... There's a...
There's two dozen French police officers out there right now on Christmas Eve.
ko: 지금 크리스마스 이브에 프랑스 경찰이 두 다스나 나와 있다는 거야?

en: That's what you're telling me? Yeah. All right. All right.
ko: 그게 네 말이야? 그래. 알겠어. 알겠어.

en: Well, there's no windows here.
I'm going to take a look out the front door. No. No.
ko: 앞문 밖을 좀 볼게. 안 돼. 안 돼.

en: I told them I'd walk out first and give a signal.
You put these on yourself.
No. I can't do that. I can't do that.
ko: 안 돼. 그건 못 해. 그건 못 해.

en: You know why?
Because I think you're full of shit.
I don't think there's anyone else out there that thinks it's just me and you.
ko: 나와 너만 있다고 생각하는 사람은 없다고 생각해.

en: That's right. I think it's just me and you.
And you know what?
You're going to have to catch me yourself.
We don't have time for this.
ko: 이런 데 시간 낭비할 시간이 없어.

en: That's good. That's good.
Tell me what you want me to see, huh?
ko: 내가 뭘 보길 원하는지 말해줘, 응?

en: I wouldn't lie to you.
Look, you're wearing a wedding ring.
You're wearing a wedding ring, Carl. You lied to me about that. You lied about that.
ko: 너 결혼반지를 끼고 있어, 칼. 그거에 대해 나에게 거짓말했어. 그거에 대해 거짓말했어.

en: You asked me if I had a family. I did.
ko: 너가 나에게 가족이 있냐고 물었지. 있었어.
